judgment.summary: TSM delivers massive growth and industry-leading margins supported by an exceptionally strong cash position.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 3.49 beat the 3.33 estimate by 4.7%, with the next earnings date set for 2026-07-16.
positives: Forward P/E 20.72 vs trailing 34.71 — suggests attractive valuation relative to future earnings.
Revenue growth 35.1% and earnings growth 58.4% — indicates rapid top and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 46.5% — reflects extremely high operational efficiency.
Price/Sales (TTM) 0.51 — represents a very low valuation relative to revenue.
Free cash flow (TTM) $719.16B — demonstrates massive cash generation capacity.
negatives: Price/Book 61.85 — indicates a very high valuation relative to book value.
Beta 1.26 — suggests higher volatility than the broader market.
Dividend yield 0.9% — offers limited income for investors.

news.paragraph: Taiwan Semiconductor is seeing strong positive sentiment driven by its ability to capitalize on the AI boom and its overall fundamental strength. While some institutional shifts are occurring, such as Vanguard trimming its stake and Cathie Wood selling semiconductor shares, several analysts maintain a highly bullish outlook on the stock. Options traders should weigh this sector-wide momentum against recent institutional selling activity.
